evals.name: update-existing-hq-arch
evals.prompt: Update the architecture doc to include a plugin system. Plugins should be loadable at runtime, have access to a sandboxed API, and communicate with the main process via IPC. Think VS Code extensions but simpler.
evals.expected_output: Updated docs/ARCH.md with new plugin system sections woven into existing architecture, preserving existing content, adding mermaid diagrams for plugin lifecycle and IPC, and a What We Build vs Reuse section

evals.name: greenfield-api-service
evals.prompt: Create an architecture doc for a new notification service. It needs to handle email, push, and SMS delivery with templating, user preferences, rate limiting, and retry logic. It'll be a standalone service consumed by our other apps via REST and events. We expect ~100k notifications/day at launch growing to 1M/day within a year.
evals.expected_output: New docs/ARCH.md with full greenfield structure: system overview, component diagram, sequence diagrams for notification flow, tech stack with justification, scalability considerations for the 100k-1M growth, and key decisions table

evals.name: incremental-mobile-companion
evals.prompt: We need an arch doc for adding a mobile companion app to HQ. It should show real-time project status, let you approve/reject agent actions, and send push notifications for important events. The existing ARCH.md already mentions a mobile app placeholder — flesh this out into a proper feature architecture.
evals.expected_output: New docs/mobile/ARCH.md (incremental), referencing the existing HQ ARCH.md, with system overview showing mobile connecting to existing HQ backend, WebSocket protocol details, push notification flow, and clear New vs Reuse inventory
